name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Applications in Flows
notes: This Building Block triggers when communication with a Mail Application is detected.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Applications in Flows on flows which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the flow matches Application is any of [Mail or HttpWeb.FreeEmailSites or HttpWeb.Gmail or HttpWeb.Yahoo!Mail or HttpWeb.AOLMail or HttpWeb.Outlook or HttpWeb.T-OnlineMail or HttpWeb.QQMail]
